item.title: GODSPEED MODE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]

item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED MODE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] GODSPEED [/color][color=#008000]MODE [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] COMBO [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1733388/]1.GSM PROFILE manager [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS 4 PROFILES AND THIS IS PART OF GODSPEED MODE [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]2.GSM ZRAM [/url]
[b] INCREASE YOUR RAM UP TO 20 GB [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]3.GSGCC [/url]
[b] IT WILL CLEAN GPU CACHE [/b]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]
[color=#008000]Introducing Godspeed Mode, the ultimate Magisk module that catapults your Android device into overdrive! With its sleek and dynamic design, this mod unleashes a whirlwind of performance and power, all at your fingertips.

Prepare to be amazed by the four awe-inspiring profiles offered by Godspeed Mode: Balance, Battery, Ultra Battery, and Gaming. Each profile is meticulously crafted to suit your specific needs, delivering a harmonious blend of efficiency and excitement. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]Immerse yourself in the Balance profile, where equilibrium reigns supreme. It gracefully balances your device's performance and battery life, allowing you to seamlessly navigate through your day without compromising on power. [/color]

Step into the Battery profile, where energy conservation takes center stage. With ingenious optimizations and system tweaks, your device will stay powered up for extended periods, ensuring you never miss a beat. [/color]

[color=#0000FF]For the adventurers seeking maximum battery savings, the Ultra Battery profile takes you on an unparalleled journey. By fine-tuning system resources and minimizing power consumption, it propels your device's endurance to extraordinary levels. [/color]

[color=#800080]Calling all gamers! Strap in for the Gaming profile, purpose-built for the gaming connoisseur within you. Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. And as if that weren't enough, tweak your device's screen resolution to witness graphics like never before.

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey, where your device becomes a force to be reckoned with. Let Godspeed Mode redefine what you thought was possible and elevate your Android experience to new dimensions. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[read more]

[b] THIS APP HAS 4 PROFILES AND THIS IS PART OF GODSPEED MODE [/b]

[b] INCREASE YOUR RAM UP TO 20 GB [/b]

[b] IT WILL CLEAN GPU CACHE [/b]

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]
[color=#008000]Introducing Godspeed Mode, the ultimate Magisk module that catapults your Android device into overdrive! With its sleek and dynamic design, this mod unleashes a whirlwind of performance and power, all at your fingertips.

Prepare to be amazed by the four awe-inspiring profiles offered by Godspeed Mode: Balance, Battery, Ultra Battery, and Gaming. Each profile is meticulously crafted to suit your specific needs, delivering a harmonious blend of efficiency and excitement. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]Immerse yourself in the Balance profile, where equilibrium reigns supreme. It gracefully balances your device's performance and battery life, allowing you to seamlessly navigate through your day without compromising on power. [/color]

Step into the Battery profile, where energy conservation takes center stage. With ingenious optimizations and system tweaks, your device will stay powered up for extended periods, ensuring you never miss a beat. [/color]

[color=#0000FF]For the adventurers seeking maximum battery savings, the Ultra Battery profile takes you on an unparalleled journey. By fine-tuning system resources and minimizing power consumption, it propels your device's endurance to extraordinary levels. [/color]

[color=#800080]Calling all gamers! Strap in for the Gaming profile, purpose-built for the gaming connoisseur within you. Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. And as if that weren't enough, tweak your device's screen resolution to witness graphics like never before.

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey, where your device becomes a force to be reckoned with. Let Godspeed Mode redefine what you thought was possible and elevate your Android experience to new dimensions. [/color]

Prepare to be amazed by the four awe-inspiring profiles offered by Godspeed Mode: Balance, Battery, Ultra Battery, and Gaming. Each profile is meticulously crafted to suit your specific needs, delivering a harmonious blend of efficiency and excitement. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]Immerse yourself in the Balance profile, where equilibrium reigns supreme. It gracefully balances your device's performance and battery life, allowing you to seamlessly navigate through your day without compromising on power. [/color]

Step into the Battery profile, where energy conservation takes center stage. With ingenious optimizations and system tweaks, your device will stay powered up for extended periods, ensuring you never miss a beat. [/color]

[color=#0000FF]For the adventurers seeking maximum battery savings, the Ultra Battery profile takes you on an unparalleled journey. By fine-tuning system resources and minimizing power consumption, it propels your device's endurance to extraordinary levels. [/color]

[color=#800080]Calling all gamers! Strap in for the Gaming profile, purpose-built for the gaming connoisseur within you. Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. And as if that weren't enough, tweak your device's screen resolution to witness graphics like never before.

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. item.title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.


Elevate Your Gaming Experience with Godspeed Controller AIM
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.

Unleash Your Aim with Godspeed Controller AIM
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Dominate the Battlefield
Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

Easy Installation, Instant Results
With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.


Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
1. What games are compatible with Godspeed Controller AIM?
Godspeed Controller AIM is compatible with various joystick-supported Android games, including popular titles like PUBG Mobile, Call of Duty Mobile, Free Fire, and more.

2. Is Godspeed Controller AIM safe to use?
Yes, Godspeed Controller AIM is developed by reputable developers and has been tested extensively to ensure its safety and effectiveness. However, users should always exercise caution when installing third-party modules and follow the installation instructions carefully.

3. Will using Godspeed Controller AIM get me banned in games?
While the module is designed to enhance aiming precision, it does not provide unfair advantages or modify game files, making it unlikely to trigger bans in games. However, it's essential to use any gaming enhancement tool responsibly and within the terms of service of the respective games.

4. How can I install Godspeed Controller AIM?
To install Godspeed Controller AIM, download the Magisk module from the provided source and install it through the Magisk Manager app. Reboot your device after installation to apply the changes.

Revolutionize your gaming experience today with Godspeed Controller AIM. Say goodbye to recoil frustrations and hello to precision aiming like never before. Install the module and take your place among the elite gamers who dominate with ease. It's time to elevate your game and leave your competition in the dust.


[read more]
item.description:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.


Elevate Your Gaming Experience with Godspeed Controller AIM
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.

Unleash Your Aim with Godspeed Controller AIM
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Dominate the Battlefield
Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

Easy Installation, Instant Results
With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.


Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
1. What games are compatible with Godspeed Controller AIM?
Godspeed Controller AIM is compatible with various joystick-supported Android games, including popular titles like PUBG Mobile, Call of Duty Mobile, Free Fire, and more.

2. Is Godspeed Controller AIM safe to use?
Yes, Godspeed Controller AIM is developed by reputable developers and has been tested extensively to ensure its safety and effectiveness. However, users should always exercise caution when installing third-party modules and follow the installation instructions carefully.

3. Will using Godspeed Controller AIM get me banned in games?
While the module is designed to enhance aiming precision, it does not provide unfair advantages or modify game files, making it unlikely to trigger bans in games. However, it's essential to use any gaming enhancement tool responsibly and within the terms of service of the respective games.

4. How can I install Godspeed Controller AIM?
To install Godspeed Controller AIM, download the Magisk module from the provided source and install it through the Magisk Manager app. Reboot your device after installation to apply the changes.

Revolutionize your gaming experience today with Godspeed Controller AIM. Say goodbye to recoil frustrations and hello to precision aiming like never before. Install the module and take your place among the elite gamers who dominate with ease. It's time to elevate your game and leave your competition in the dust.

item.content:encoded:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.


Elevate Your Gaming Experience with Godspeed Controller AIM
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.

Unleash Your Aim with Godspeed Controller AIM
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Dominate the Battlefield
Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

Easy Installation, Instant Results
With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.


Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
1. What games are compatible with Godspeed Controller AIM?
Godspeed Controller AIM is compatible with various joystick-supported Android games, including popular titles like PUBG Mobile, Call of Duty Mobile, Free Fire, and more.

2. Is Godspeed Controller AIM safe to use?
Yes, Godspeed Controller AIM is developed by reputable developers and has been tested extensively to ensure its safety and effectiveness. However, users should always exercise caution when installing third-party modules and follow the installation instructions carefully.

3. Will using Godspeed Controller AIM get me banned in games?
While the module is designed to enhance aiming precision, it does not provide unfair advantages or modify game files, making it unlikely to trigger bans in games. However, it's essential to use any gaming enhancement tool responsibly and within the terms of service of the respective games.

4. How can I install Godspeed Controller AIM?
To install Godspeed Controller AIM, download the Magisk module from the provided source and install it through the Magisk Manager app. Reboot your device after installation to apply the changes.

Revolutionize your gaming experience today with Godspeed Controller AIM. Say goodbye to recoil frustrations and hello to precision aiming like never before. Install the module and take your place among the elite gamers who dominate with ease. It's time to elevate your game and leave your competition in the dust.

item.title: pwall [Image Viewers]
item.itunes:title: pwall [Image Viewers]
item.itunes:author: ltiber
item.itunes:summary:
pwall
(Image Viewers)
Browse your photos/videos with pwall.
This app is modern style photo/video viewer and organizer.
It shows the folders of your photos/videos main directory in the left pane and a photowall in the right.
The photowall is a scrolling panel of square thumbnails giving a preview of each photo/video.
Loading and unloading of this scrolling panel is made dynamically, viewing page by viewing page
like smartphones do.
It also allows you to have basics management of photos/videos
(change dates, copy a group of photos to another directory, delete, share, get GPS data...).
Clicking on a photo opens it in fullscreen mode. You can continue your navigation in this mode with left and right keys.
I use it as an alternative to Shotwell.

It has been tested in ubuntu 16.04, 18.04, 20.04 and has been built over the GTK 3 framework.
To enjoy all the features, you also need to install jhead, ffmpeg and gstreamer libraries
with sudo apt install jhead ffmpeg libgstreamer1.0-0 gstreamer1.0-plugins-base gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav gstreamer1.0-pulseaudio
To install the .deb file, run sudo dpkg -i pwall-x.x-x.deb (where -x.x-x is the version you've downloaded).
If you've got dependency errors run sudo apt install -f
[read more]
item.description:
pwall
(Image Viewers)
Browse your photos/videos with pwall.
This app is modern style photo/video viewer and organizer.
It shows the folders of your photos/videos main directory in the left pane and a photowall in the right.
The photowall is a scrolling panel of square thumbnails giving a preview of each photo/video.
Loading and unloading of this scrolling panel is made dynamically, viewing page by viewing page
like smartphones do.
It also allows you to have basics management of photos/videos
(change dates, copy a group of photos to another directory, delete, share, get GPS data...).
Clicking on a photo opens it in fullscreen mode. You can continue your navigation in this mode with left and right keys.
I use it as an alternative to Shotwell.

It has been tested in ubuntu 16.04, 18.04, 20.04 and has been built over the GTK 3 framework.
To enjoy all the features, you also need to install jhead, ffmpeg and gstreamer libraries
with sudo apt install jhead ffmpeg libgstreamer1.0-0 gstreamer1.0-plugins-base gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav gstreamer1.0-pulseaudio
To install the .deb file, run sudo dpkg -i pwall-x.x-x.deb (where -x.x-x is the version you've downloaded).
If you've got dependency errors run sudo apt install -f
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
pwall
(Image Viewers)
Browse your photos/videos with pwall.
This app is modern style photo/video viewer and organizer.
It shows the folders of your photos/videos main directory in the left pane and a photowall in the right.
The photowall is a scrolling panel of square thumbnails giving a preview of each photo/video.
Loading and unloading of this scrolling panel is made dynamically, viewing page by viewing page
like smartphones do.
It also allows you to have basics management of photos/videos
(change dates, copy a group of photos to another directory, delete, share, get GPS data...).
Clicking on a photo opens it in fullscreen mode. You can continue your navigation in this mode with left and right keys.
I use it as an alternative to Shotwell.

It has been tested in ubuntu 16.04, 18.04, 20.04 and has been built over the GTK 3 framework.
To enjoy all the features, you also need to install jhead, ffmpeg and gstreamer libraries
with sudo apt install jhead ffmpeg libgstreamer1.0-0 gstreamer1.0-plugins-base gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav gstreamer1.0-pulseaudio
To install the .deb file, run sudo dpkg -i pwall-x.x-x.deb (where -x.x-x is the version you've downloaded).
If you've got dependency errors run sudo apt install -f
[read more]

item.title: SBTE simple Bash text editor [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: SBTE simple Bash text editor [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: djmaxcz
item.itunes:summary:
SBTE simple Bash text editor
(Terminal Apps)
simple-text-editor
This project aims to provide a simple text editor with basic functionalities like creating, opening, editing, and saving text files.
if plugins doesnt work move the plugins and delete the folder
This program is a simple text editor implemented in Bash script. It provides basic functionalities like creating new files, opening existing files, editing files, saving files, searching for words, replacing words, counting words, and deleting files.
Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:
Create a new file
open an existing file
Edit an existing file
Save file
Save As
Search for a word
Replace a word
Word Count
support plugins
Delete a file
Exit
Vim Version
This program also has a Vim version It have same functionalities as the Bash script version but it opens the Vim text editor

Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:
Create a new file
pen an existing file
Edit an existing file
Save file
Save As
support plugins
Delete a file
Exit
[read more]

Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:

Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:

pen an existing file

Delete a file

simple-text-editor
This project aims to provide a simple text editor with basic functionalities like creating, opening, editing, and saving text files.
if plugins doesnt work move the plugins and delete the folder
This program is a simple text editor implemented in Bash script. It provides basic functionalities like creating new files, opening existing files, editing files, saving files, searching for words, replacing words, counting words, and deleting files.
Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:
Create a new file
open an existing file
Edit an existing file
Save file
Save As
Search for a word
Replace a word
Word Count
support plugins
Delete a file
Exit
Vim Version
This program also has a Vim version It have same functionalities as the Bash script version but it opens the Vim text editor

Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:
Create a new file
pen an existing file
Edit an existing file
Save file

support plugins
